header.description: Get, add and update data in MySQL

oldVersionNotice.displayName: New node version available: get the latest version with added features from the nodes panel.

query.placeholder: SELECT id, name FROM product WHERE id < 40

table.description: Name of the table in which to update data in

columns.description: Comma-separated list of the properties which should used as columns for rows to update

ignore.description: Whether to ignore any ignorable errors that occur while executing the INSERT statement

priority.description: Ignore any ignorable errors that occur while executing the INSERT statement

LOW_PRIORITY.description: Delays execution of the INSERT until no other clients are reading from the table

HIGH_PRIORITY.description: Overrides the effect of the --low-priority-updates option if the server was started with that option. It also causes concurrent inserts not to be used.

updateKey.description: Name of the property which decides which rows in the database should be updated. Normally that would be "id".
